allow: PowerShell($pkgs = @\('react','react-dom','react-router-dom','recharts','framer-motion','howler','vite','tailwindcss','autoprefixer','postcss'\); foreach \($p in $pkgs\) { if \(Test-Path "node_modules\\$p"\) { "OK   $p" } else { "MISS $p" } }; "--- vite bin ---"; if \(Test-Path "node_modules\\.bin\\vite.cmd"\) { "vite.cmd present" } else { "no vite.cmd" })
